instruction: Open Safari and navigate the front tab to {URL}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads the front tab URL via AppleScript; baseline about:blank so the no-op scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to activate' -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "about:blank"' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "{URL}"' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Safari" to get URL of front document
